title: zerna purgans
intro: Zerna purgans, also known as Stillingia or Queen's Delight, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The medicinal properties of Zerna purgans lie in its ability to stimulate liver function and promote the removal of toxins from the body, making it a natural remedy for liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of consuming Zerna purgans preparations include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners. Zerna purgans can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used to support liver health and promote overall well-being.
